About Us

DETAILING AS AN ART FORM

Zach Duke Mobile Detailing brings concierge-level automotive care directly to you. From full interior and exterior details to paint correction, ceramic coatings, and marine detailing — every vehicle receives meticulous, hand-crafted attention.

We serve the entire Gulf Coast panhandle from Mobile to Destin. Whether it's your daily driver, a fleet vehicle, your show car, or your boat — we treat every surface like it deserves to shine.

🚗100% Mobile
⭐5-Star Rated
⚓Boats Too
🛠Paint Correction

FROM DAILY DRIVERS TO SHOW STOPPERS

Full interior & exterior detailing, paint correction, ceramic coating, buff-on wax, and complete marine services. We come to your driveway, office, or marina.

What We Do

OUR SERVICES

✦

FULL DETAIL

Complete vacuum, dashboard, doors, console, glass, mirrors, buttons, cup holders, wheel & rim cleaning, leather conditioning, bug & tar removal, and buff-on wax or spray wax.

$200+ / starting
◆

PAINT CORRECTION

Remove swirl marks, scratches, oxidation, and defects from your clear coat. Multi-stage correction restores factory-fresh depth and clarity.

Quote / based on condition
◈

CERAMIC COATING

Professional-grade ceramic coating for long-lasting hydrophobic protection. Your paint stays cleaner, shines harder, and resists damage for years.

Quote / based on vehicle
⚓

BOAT DETAILING

Wash & wax, oxidation removal from gel coat, and full marine detailing. Every boat is quoted individually for proper care of your vessel.

Quote / required
✱

BUFF-ON WAX

Premium hand-applied wax for deep, wet shine and durable paint protection. The kind of finish that makes your neighbors stop and stare.

Included / with full detail
◎

SHAMPOO & EXTRACT

Deep extraction cleaning for fabric seats and carpets. Removes stains, odors, and ground-in dirt that vacuuming alone can't touch.

Add-On / available

Investment
